site.title: Mutoli - Natural honey fuel for fitness enthusiasts
site.description: Natural honey fuel for fitness enthusiasts. Pre-workout energy, post-workout recovery. Pure, natural fuel for athletes and weight management.
site.tagline: Natural fuel for athletes and fitness enthusiasts

story.founderQuote: Mutoli was born for fitness lovers who want natural, pure energy instead of chemicals. After years of relying on artificial supplements, I discovered the incredible power of pure honey. It transformed my workouts and recovery, and I knew I had to share this with fellow fitness enthusiasts.
story.mission: To provide fitness enthusiasts with the purest, most natural energy source that supports both performance and recovery without compromising health.
story.promise: Every jar of Mutoli is carefully sourced and tested to ensure you get nothing but pure, natural honey that fuels your fitness journey.

features.title: Energy Booster
features.description: Natural sugars provide instant and sustained energy for your workouts and daily activities

features.title: 100% Pure
features.description: No chemicals, no additives, no artificial ingredients - just pure, natural honey

features.title: Recovery Support
features.description: Antioxidants and natural compounds help your body recover faster after intense training

seo.keywords: honey, energy, recovery, fitness, natural, pure, pre-order, Mutoli
seo.author: Mutoli Team
